title.en: Although, he was only killed by a replica body.

content.en:
Ye Tian had a great enmity with the Xuhai Realm Lord, once he went to the Heavenly Pavilion to buy information and sell a perfect super-dimensional Dao inheritance, but the Xuhai Realm Lord attacked him and wanted to snatch his super-dimensional treasure coins.

Although, he was only killed by a replica body.

But this is already a mortal enemy!

That is, he has a replica body, if he only has a real body, wouldn't he definitely die!

Therefore, he has always wanted to kill the Lord of the Asahi Sea.

But after all, the Xuhai Realm Lord is the transcendent realm of the first realm, and according to his understanding, the cultivation of the Xuhai Realm Lord has reached the late stage of the first realm, and the strength of such cultivation is not weak.

If he didn't comprehend the extradimensional rules, he would be sure to defeat the Asahi Realm Lord, but it would be impossible for him to kill the Asahi Realm Lord.

But now he has not only comprehended the ten superdimensional rules, but also created a superdimensional supernatural power, which is enough to instantly kill the Xuhai Realm Lord who has cultivated in the late stage of the first realm.

Of course, the Asahi Sea Realm Lord had been staying in the branch of the Sky Pavilion.

There is a super-dimensional large array in the peep-sky branch, that formation is extraordinary, and the super-dimensional rules are burned, even if the super-dimensional realm powerhouse of the second realm makes a move, it is impossible to break the formation in an instant.

If Ye Tian wants to break through that formation, it will take a lot of time to get 420.

Therefore, it was impossible for him to attack the branch of the Peep Heaven Pavilion, otherwise the super-dimensional realm powerhouse of the second realm of the Peep Heaven Pavilion would be able to rush over in time.

Once the first attack fails, the Asahi Sea Realm Lord will inevitably hide, and it will not be easy to kill.

The best way is to lure the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm out, and then do it.

And it is not difficult to lead out the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm, that is, to expose some treasures again, so as to lead out the Lord of the Asahi Sea.

And so this day.

Ye Tian asked a half-step extradimensional realm copy body to go to the Peep Heaven Pavilion branch to buy information, and took out a perfect extradimensional Dao inheritance, but in the end it was not sold to Peep Heaven Pavilion.

It's just that he exposed that he had a perfect extradimensional Dao inheritance.

And this matter really attracted the attention of the Asahi Sea Realm Lord.

"A half-step transcendent realm actually has a perfect transcendent Dao inheritance!"

The Lord of the Xuhai Realm thought of the half-step superdimensional realm that had placed himself together, and the other party sold a perfect superdimensional Dao inheritance to Peep Heaven Pavilion, although he killed the other party, but the other party transferred a large number of superdimensional treasure coins.

Now, this half-step transcendent realm has taken out a perfect transcendental Dao inheritance.

It's such a coincidence.

After all, the perfect extradimensional dao species are not easy to create, and only those powerful extradimensional forces can hope to create them, and both times they are two half-step superdimensional realms.

If it weren't for the uniqueness of the Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species, otherwise he would have doubted that these two Perfect Extradimensional Dao Species were the same.

"It's just a half-step transcendent realm, and if you kill it, you can get a perfect extradimensional Dao seed, which is also a big gain!"

The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm thought so.

Therefore, he secretly followed Ye Tian, and once Ye Tian went out, he would do it.

This time, he stared at Ye Tian's every move.

And Ye Tian quickly left here and went to the outside world.

The Asahi Sea Realm Lord immediately followed.

......

Seeing that the time was almost up, the Xuhai Realm immediately appeared and attacked Ye Tian.

The Extra-Dimensional Realm could instantly kill any half-step Extra-Dimensional Realm, and he thought that he would be able to go back after killing Ye Tian in seconds.

But suddenly, he found that Ye Tian was smiling, obviously not panicking at all.

"What's going on?"

He was a little confused.

Could it be that Ye Tian's half-step extradimensional realm could still compete with him?

But the next moment, he understood why.

Rumble!!!!

"Extradimensional Annihilation!"

"Kill!"

The speed of this blow was too fast, and it locked on the Lord of the Asahi Sea.

The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm couldn't dodge at all, and his will was already covered by endless fear.

He couldn't have imagined that there would be a superdimensional realm powerhouse who had comprehended the rules of the extradimensional to assassinate him, and he judged in an instant that this half-step extradimensional realm must be just a decoy to attract him out, and then attack and kill him. []

It was all planned.

And he didn't know when he had offended this extradimensional realm powerhouse.

Moreover, time was too short for him to think.

He could only resist with all his might, but the horror of the superdimensional powers was far beyond his imagination.

Burst!

Under the blow, a defensive extra-dimensional Dao soldier on his body was also penetrated, his physical body was pierced, his will was shattered, and his vitality was annihilated.

Looking at the corpse of the Xuhai Realm Lord, Ye Tian smiled.

The power of the extra-dimensional annihilation technique is very good, and even an extra-dimensional realm like the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm can kill with one blow.

Then, he took away the treasure on the body of the Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm, and then quickly fled.

After all, he had killed one of the extradimensional realms of the Sky Seeping Pavilion, and the Sky Seeping Pavilion would definitely not let him go.

Of course, he is not afraid that the Heavenly Pavilion will be able to find him, he has already comprehended the extradimensional rules, and if he wants to deduce and track down a strong person who has comprehended the extradimensional rules, the second transcendent realm cannot do it, unless the third realm of the extradimensional realm uses the deduction treasures of the high-level extradimensional dao soldiers, he can do it.

And the Sky Seeping Pavilion does not have a third-realm super-dimensional realm powerhouse, and it is unlikely that it will have a high-level super-dimensional Dao soldier-level deduction treasure.

It didn't take long.

The fall of the Lord of the Xuhai Realm was known by the Sky Pavilion, after all, Ye Tian and the Xuhai Realm took the initiative, even if they only fought for a moment, but the power of the extradimensional realm erupted out, which naturally attracted the attention of the outside world.

Soon.

Another extradimensional realm of the Heavenly Pavilion has descended.

"The Lord of the Asahi Sea Realm has been killed!!!"

This extradimensional realm was terrified, because his strength was not as good as the Xuhai Realm Lord, and the other party could kill the Xuhai Realm Lord, and he could also kill him!

He immediately informed the second realm transcendent realm powerhouse of the Peep Heaven Pavilion.

Not long after, a peerless realm powerhouse of the second realm came to the sky-the Heavenly Wound Realm Lord.

"I've seen the Heavenly Wound Realm Lord!"

Several extra-dimensional realms and many half-step extra-dimensional realms said respectfully.

The Heavenly Wound Realm Lord looked at the corpse of the Asahi Sea Realm Lord, and checked the traces of the battle, and he sensed a faint trace of extradimensional rules from the traces here.

"Extradimensional rules, it's the second extradimensional realm that is in action?"

"It may also be the first realm to comprehend the rules of the extradimensional!"

The Heavenly Wound Realm Lord was very annoyed.

Any extra-dimensional realm is very important to the Sky Pavilion, and it is one of the backbones of the Sky Pavilion, and the loss of an extra-dimensional realm is a huge loss to the Sky Pavilion.

What's more, the Lord of the Xuhai Realm is already a late stage cultivator of the First Realm, and if he goes further, he is the peak cultivation of the First Realm, and he belongs to an extremely powerful existence in the First Realm.

As a result, such a strong man was assassinated.
